message:
fix(sqlmodel): correct test assertions for generic model tests

Fixes test compilation issues in generic model tests:
- Add Default derive to marker types (UserData, OrderData)
- Fix table name assertions to use pluralized form (tagged_models, typed_responses)
- Fix test_generic_model_is_new to use correct TaggedModel field names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
